source.sqlReaderQuery:
select max(modified_date) as
newwatermark from dbo.sales

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT *
FROM dbo.sales
WHERE modified_date > '@{activity('Lookup_get_oldwatermark').output.firstRow.watermarkvalue}'
AND modified_date <= '@{activity('Lookup_get_newwatermark').output.firstRow.newwatermark}'
